settings.customDomainsDesc: Use a URL on your own brand, like pages.your-business.com, instead of the default Tipote address. Your pages open on your own domain.

cloudflare.s1: Open the DNS tab of {root} in your Cloudflare dashboard.
cloudflare.s3: Pick CNAME, set Name to "{name}" and Target to "{cnameTarget}".
cloudflare.s4: IMPORTANT: switch Proxy status to "DNS only" (gray cloud), then save.

ovh.s1: Open the OVH manager, go to your domain {root}, then the DNS zone tab.
ovh.s2: Click "Add an entry" and choose CNAME.
ovh.s3: Set the sub-domain to "{name}" and the target to "{cnameTarget}." (with the trailing dot).
ovh.s4: Validate and wait a few minutes for propagation.

godaddy.s1: Open the GoDaddy DNS Management page for {root}.
godaddy.s3: Type = CNAME, Name = "{name}", Value = "{cnameTarget}", TTL = 1 Hour.

namecheap.s2: Click "Add New Record" and choose "CNAME Record".
namecheap.s4: Click the green check to save.

gandi.s1: Open your Gandi DNS records page for {root}.
gandi.s3: Type CNAME, Name = "{name}", Hostname = "{cnameTarget}." (with the trailing dot).

google.s2: Add a new custom resource record.

generic.s1: Open the DNS management for {root} in your registrar's dashboard.
generic.s2: Find the option to add a new DNS record.
generic.s3: Create a CNAME with Name = "{name}" and Target/Value = "{cnameTarget}".
generic.s4: Save the record. We'll detect the change automatically.

tutorial.welcomeA11y: Guided tour to get started with the app
tutorial.welcomeBody: In 2 minutes, I'll show you how everything works. But before creating anything, make sure to complete your settings - it's the key to truly personalised content!
tutorial.welcomeStep1: Discover each tool at a glance
tutorial.welcomeOptOut: I already know Tipote, don't show me this guide again
tutorial.completeHeading: Well done, you know it all!
tutorial.completeBody: You've seen all the tools. Now the most important step before creating anything: complete your settings so Tipote generates truly personalised content.
tutorial.completeTipDesc: Before creating, fill in your offers, refine your positioning and check your persona. Click your profile photo (top right) to access settings. The more complete, the better your content!
tutorial.completeTipOffers: Your offers - describe them so Tipote can weave them into your content
tutorial.completeTipPositioning: Your positioning - refine your target and message after onboarding
tutorial.completeTipPersona: Your persona - check that the ideal client profile matches your reality
tutorial.completeOptOut: Don't show me this guide again
tutorial.nudgeDesc: 2 min to discover each tool and know exactly what to do.
tutorial.tooltipToday: Today - your daily home page. Find your priority tasks, key stats and a summary of your progress.
tutorial.tooltipStrategy: Strategy - your personalised roadmap. 3-phase action plan, offer pyramid and target persona. You can adjust everything.
tutorial.tooltipCreate: Create - generate posts, emails, articles, video scripts, offers, pages, quizzes and editorial strategy. Each generation uses AI credits.
tutorial.tooltipContents: My Content - everything you've created, organised by type. Editorial calendar, publication scheduling, quiz and page tracking.
tutorial.tooltipAutomations: Automations - reply to comments automatically on your socials: Instagram and Facebook DMs, TikTok replies, triggered by keywords.
tutorial.tooltipLeads: My leads - manage every contact captured by your quizzes and pages in one place.
tutorial.tooltipClients: Client tracking - follow your clients and their programs so nothing slips through.
tutorial.tooltipWebinars: Live events - run your webinars and challenges, track sign-ups and KPIs to convert.
tutorial.tooltipWidgets: Widgets - social proof notifications and share buttons to embed on your pages and boost conversion.
tutorial.tooltipTemplates: Templates - ready-to-use Systeme.io models, downloadable in one click. Included in your plan!
tutorial.tooltipCredits: AI Credits - your counter in the top right. Click it to see details or recharge.
tutorial.tooltipAnalytics: Analytics - enter your stats regularly so Tipote can refine your strategy and give you a personalised AI diagnosis.
tutorial.tooltipPepites: Gems - business tips that appear over time. The red badge means something new!
tutorial.tooltipSettingsProfile: Profile - your info, storytelling, offers and links. Access settings via your profile photo in the top right.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsConnections: Connections - connect your social networks to publish directly. Also set up your Systeme.io API key here.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsReglages: Settings - content language and key info about your business. The more complete, the better Tipote understands you!
tutorial.tooltipSettingsPositioning: Positioning - THE most important setting! Refine your target, message and positioning after onboarding. This powers all your content.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsBranding: Branding - your colours, fonts and logo so generated pages instantly match your brand.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsAi: AI & Credits - track your usage and customise the style of your auto-comments.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsPricing: Subscription - manage your plan: upgrade, downgrade or cancel independently.
tutorial.tooltipCoach: AI Coach - your personal adviser (PRO and ELITE plans). It knows your project and helps you make the right decisions.
tutorial.tooltipComplete: Tour complete! Before creating, go complete your settings: offers, positioning and persona. Click your profile photo in the top right.

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Manage your integrations and connected accounts.
connections.autoDesc: Once a visitor converts (quiz, page, survey…), Tipote tags the contact in Systeme.io. That tag can trigger an automation - adding to a campaign, granting course access, adding to a community, etc. Everything is configured in Systeme.io, no code required.
connections.autoStep1Title: Create your tags in Systeme.io before building your content
connections.autoStep1P1: In Systeme.io > Contacts > Tags, create one tag per scenario you want to automate. Examples: quiz-visionary, capture-ebook, webinar-X-capture, quiz-share (for visitors who shared).
connections.autoStep1P2: Then, when creating your quiz / page / survey in Tipote, attach those tags to the matching result or conversion (Systeme.io tag field).
connections.autoSurveyNote: Running a survey? Surveys have no results, so there's a single tag: set it in the survey's contact form (the « Lead tag » field). It's applied to everyone who submits. Steps 2 and 3 work exactly the same.
connections.autoStep2P1: In Systeme.io > Automations > Rules, click Create a rule.
connections.autoStep2Trigger: Trigger: "Tag added to a contact" → pick your tag (e.g. quiz-visionary)
connections.autoStep2Actions: Actions (chain as many as you want):
connections.autoStep2A1: Subscribe to an email campaign (onboarding sequence, newsletter…)
connections.autoStep2A2: Grant access to a course in your Systeme.io school
connections.autoStep2A4: Send a one-off email (welcome, bonus, etc.)
connections.autoStep2A5: Add another tag, trigger a webhook, etc.
connections.autoStep3Title: What happens when a visitor converts
connections.autoStep3P: The visitor enters their email → Tipote creates (or updates) the contact in Systeme.io and applies the matching tag. Systeme.io detects the tag and runs every action in your rule. Zero clicks on your end.
connections.autoTestP: Systeme.io will NOT re-fire an automation if the tag is already on your test email. Before every new test, go to Contacts, open your test contact, and remove the tag manually - otherwise you'll see the contact in Systeme.io but the rule won't trigger, and you'll think it's broken.

guide.title: How to activate your automations
guide.intro: Follow these 4 simple steps so your followers receive an automatic DM whenever they comment a keyword on your posts.

step1.title: Connect your Meta account
step1.desc: Go to Settings → Connections and connect your professional Instagram and/or Facebook account (Page or Creator Account).

step2.title: Check messaging access
step2.desc: From your Instagram account or Facebook Page, make sure DMs and messages are enabled in your privacy settings.

step3.title: Create your automation here
step3.desc: Choose a trigger keyword (e.g. PDF, GUIDE, PROMO) and write the message your followers will automatically receive in their DMs.

step4.title: Test with a comment
step4.desc: Post something on Instagram or Facebook, comment with your keyword and check that you receive the automatic DM within seconds.

rgpd.title: GDPR compliance - what we do
rgpd.description: The user initiates contact by commenting → implicit consent. Every DM automatically includes 'Reply STOP to unsubscribe'. Meta's 24h window naturally limits unsolicited messages.

empty.title: No automations yet
empty.description: Create your first automation to automatically reply to comments on Instagram and Facebook.

dm.title: Auto DM on Comment
dm.description: Post 'Comment PDF to get your free guide'. When someone comments 'PDF', they automatically receive your link via DM.
dm.example: Post: 'Comment PDF 👇' → Comment 'PDF awesome' → Auto DM with the link
dm.defaultMessage:
Hey {{firstname}}! Thanks for your comment 🙌 Here's your free guide: [YOUR_LINK]

Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

email.title: Auto Email on Comment
email.description: The user comments a keyword, receives a DM asking for their email, then gets the guide delivered to their inbox via systeme.io.
email.example: Comment 'GUIDE' → DM 'Send me your email' → Email sent → Added to systeme.io
email.defaultMessage:
Hey {{firstname}}! To receive your free guide, reply to this message with your email 👇

Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
email.defaultEmailDm: Got it! I'm sending your guide to {{email}} within the next few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it 📬

playbook.title: Playbook
playbook.aiIntro: AI will use your niche, persona and offers to suggest powerful ideas.
playbook.chooseTitlePrompt: Pick the title that resonates with you most:
tips_phase1_challenge: Offer priced between €97 and €500: full training format
Schedule the challenge at the beginning or middle of the month (people are broke at the end!)
Plan 80% promo pricing for the special challenge offer
VIP option: extra coaching sessions + bonuses + lifetime replay access
Non-VIP: replay available only from one day to the next
tips_phase1_webinar: Choose an offer between €97 and €997 depending on topic complexity
Schedule the webinar at the beginning or middle of the month (best conversion rates)
Plan a time-limited offer to create urgency
Exclusive bonus reserved for live attendees to encourage attendance
tips_phase2_challenge: Deliver maximum concrete value to demonstrate your credibility
Day 1: Intro + value + exercise / Day 2: Deep dive + exercise
Day 3: Action plan + exercise + offer pitch / Day 4: Live coaching + sales
Live coaching for the most active member = engagement boost
tips_phase2_webinar: Deliver maximum concrete value to demonstrate your credibility
Structure: Hook → Value content → Proof → Offer → Q&A
Ideal duration: 45 to 75 minutes (including the sales pitch)
Clean slides: 1 idea per slide, minimal text, lots of visuals
tips_phase3: Equipment: a decent mic + a good webcam
Live software: Zoom, WebinarJam, StreamYard... (plan for at least 500 attendees)
Set up recording for replays (you can resell them later!)
Practice to feel confident on the big day
Systeme.io or equivalent: simple branding (colors + photo)
tips_phase4_challenge: Create a private group (Facebook, Telegram, WhatsApp...) dedicated to the challenge
Group engagement: participant introductions + teaser video
Emails: teasing + value + curiosity + benefits + urgency
Share via email + social media (targeted groups)
Share a well-configured capture page with affiliate link
tips_phase4_webinar: Emails: teasing + value + curiosity + benefits + urgency
Share via email + social media (targeted groups)
Create a social media event to boost visibility
tips_phase5_challenge: Reminders: D-1 + morning of each day + 1 hour before the live
Post the daily exercise in the group after each session
Daily recap + motivation post in the group
Day 3: first mention of the offer (soft pitch)
Day 4: full sales pitch + open installment payments
tips_phase5_webinar: Reminders: D-7, D-1, morning of, 1 hour before, 15 min before
During the live: ask questions to keep the audience engaged
Present the offer at the right moment: after demonstrating value
Don't be pushy: show the transformation, not the product
tips_phase6: Send a recap email within 24 hours after the event
Follow up in the group + offer reminder with urgency
Follow-up sequence: D+1, D+2, D+3 (last chance)
playbook.tips_phase6_challenge_bonus: BONUS: relaunch the challenge in replay mode to resell the offer!
playbook.tips_phase6_webinar_bonus: BONUS: offer the replay to no-shows with a time-limited link!
playbook.tips_phase6_challenge_bonus2: BONUS: resell the special offer via the challenge replay
playbook.tips_phase6_webinar_bonus2: BONUS: create a mini-course from the webinar content

helpSeo.metaTitle: Index my quizzes on Google - Tipote Help
helpSeo.metaDescription: How to make your quizzes visible on Google Search, ChatGPT, Perplexity and other search engines / AI tools. Step-by-step guide.
helpSeo.title: Index my quizzes on Google and AI tools
helpSeo.subtitle: Make your quizzes appear in Google Search, ChatGPT, Perplexity and Claude search - 5 to 10 minutes of setup, then it's automatic.

s1.heading: Why index?
s1.body1: When Google or an AI indexes your quiz, anyone can find it by searching your topic. Three concrete benefits:
s1.li1: Free recurring traffic from Google Search - every relevant search is a chance to capture a lead.
s1.li2: When someone asks ChatGPT, Perplexity or Claude "recommend me a quiz about X", your quiz can be surfaced.
s1.li3: More social shares: visitors who find you through search often share to their network.

s2.heading: Step 1 - Submit your sitemap to Google
s2.body1: Google needs a "sitemap" (list of your quizzes) to index them. Tipote generates it automatically.
s2.li1: Go to Google Search Console: https://search.google.com/search-console
s2.li2: Click "Add a property" and enter your domain (e.g. tipote.com OR your custom domain if you have one).
s2.li3: Verify ownership (via DNS TXT record - Google walks you through).
s2.li4: In the left menu, go to "Sitemaps" and enter: sitemap.xml
s2.li5: Click "Submit". Google will crawl your quizzes within 1 to 7 days.
s2.note: You don't need to re-submit for each new quiz - the sitemap is regenerated automatically every hour.

s3.heading: Step 2 - With a custom domain
s3.body1: If you have a custom domain (e.g. quiz.yoursite.com), you can index your quizzes on YOUR domain instead of tipote.com. More powerful for your SEO.
s3.li1: Add your custom domain to Google Search Console as a "domain property".
s3.li2: Verify ownership via a DNS TXT record (Google gives you the value to paste).
s3.li3: Submit the sitemap: https://your-domain.com/sitemap.xml - it will list ONLY your quizzes, on YOUR URL.

s4.heading: Step 3 - Optimize each quiz for SEO
s4.body1: The better your quiz is titled and described, the more Google and AI will surface it. Best practices:
s4.li1Body: It's the text Google shows in results. Include your main keyword.
s4.li2Title: Description ("Social preview" field in the editor)
s4.li2Body: 150-160 characters summarizing the quiz value and encouraging clicks.
s4.li3Body: Not "quiz1" but "nervous-system-profile" or "fine-art-photo-style". The slug is your URL.
s4.li4Body: Appears on Google Images and iMessage / WhatsApp previews. A great image = +20-30% clicks.

s5.heading: Step 4 - Visibility on AI (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude)
s5.body1: You have nothing extra to set up. AIs automatically crawl sites via our `llms.txt` file (a manifest we generate for you) which lists your quizzes, their description and URL in a format optimized for LLMs.
s5.note: The more you fill in the title, description and OG image in the editor, the more precisely an AI can recommend your quiz to the right users.

s6.heading: Step 5 - Hide a quiz from search engines
s6.body1: If you want to keep a quiz private (link-only, no risk of it appearing in Google), check the box "Hide this quiz from search engines" in the SEO tab of the quiz editor.
s6.body2: The quiz stays active and shareable via its direct link, but is excluded from your sitemap and AI manifest. Ideal for internal content or public drafts shared with a limited circle.

adminFiscal.introTitle: Fiscal thresholds displayed to users in /settings?tab=compta
adminFiscal.introBody: The cron /api/cron/check-fiscal-thresholds checks each day that the values below are still present on the official pages. When that's not the case, an email is sent to you with a direct link here. Just update the value, the impact is immediate for users (the dashboard re-reads the DB on each load).
adminFiscal.emptyState: No threshold in DB. The initial seed may not have been applied.
adminFiscal.categoryHint: Keys currently used by the code:
adminFiscal.majorThreshold: Major threshold (€) - leave blank if not applicable

comptaConfig.errParticulierRevenue: Indicate the type of your income.
comptaConfig.errAeStarted: Fill in the activity start date.
comptaConfig.errFiscalYearStartMonth: Indicate the fiscal year start month.
comptaConfig.errChVatPeriodicity: Choose the periodicity of your VAT returns.
comptaConfig.errPtIvaPeriodicity: Choose the periodicity of your IVA returns.
comptaConfig.errBeCompanyNumber: Invalid BCE number (must be exactly 10 digits).
comptaConfig.errBeVatPeriodicity: Choose the periodicity of your VAT returns.
comptaConfig.errEsIvaPeriodicity: Choose the periodicity of your returns.
comptaConfig.errCaGstPeriodicity: Choose the periodicity of your GST returns.
comptaConfig.particulierDescFR: Side income (in addition to a job or no other activity). Declared on the annual 2042 form.
comptaConfig.aeDesc: Micro-business (simplified scheme). Revenue declared monthly/quarterly on urssaf.fr.
comptaConfig.eurlDesc: Single-member limited liability company. Default to income tax (corporate tax optional). Full accounting.
comptaConfig.sasuDesc: Single-shareholder SAS. Corporate tax, VAT, financial statements, DSN if you pay yourself. Classic solopreneur status.
comptaConfig.sasDesc: Multiple shareholders. Same obligations as a SASU. President always treated as an employee.
comptaConfig.sarlDesc: 2 to 100 shareholders. Corporate tax by default. DSN only if minority manager (treated as employee).
comptaConfig.particulierDescCH: Side income (in addition to a job or no other activity). Everything goes through your annual cantonal + federal tax return.
comptaConfig.indepCHDesc: You operate under your own name (Einzelfirma). Quarterly AHV, VAT if revenue > CHF 100,000, personal tax return.
comptaConfig.sarlCHDesc: Limited liability company. Annual accounts, profit tax (IBO), VAT if revenue > CHF 100,000.
comptaConfig.saCHDesc: Public limited company. Min. capital CHF 100,000. Same accounting obligations as a Sàrl, more formal structure.
comptaConfig.chDisclaimer: Cantonal specifics (IBO rates, AHV, family allowances) vary across the 26 cantons. Tipote shows the federal calendar + tax filing deadlines for YOUR canton (to be selected below). For exact tax rates, your accountant remains the reference.
comptaConfig.particulierDescPT: Side income (in addition to a job or no other activity). Everything goes through your annual Modelo 3 IRS.
comptaConfig.trabalhadorIndepDesc: Self-employed registered with the AT (Recibos Verdes). Simplified regime by default, VAT if revenue > €15k, monthly Social Security.
comptaConfig.eniDesc: Empresário em Nome Individual. Commercial activity under your name, organized accounting possible.
comptaConfig.ldaUniDesc: Sociedade Unipessoal por Quotas - single shareholder. IRC 21%, annual accounts, Modelo 22, e-fatura.
comptaConfig.ldaDesc: Sociedade por Quotas - 2 or more shareholders. Same obligations as an LDA Unipessoal.
comptaConfig.saPTDesc: Sociedade Anónima. Min. capital €50,000, more formal structure. Same IRC obligations as an LDA.
comptaConfig.ptDisclaimer: Tipote covers Portuguese federal obligations (IVA, IRS, IRC, Modelo 22, Segurança Social, e-fatura). Regional specifics (Madeira / Açores have different IVA rates) are handled via the region selector below. For exact tax calculations, your contabilista certificado remains the reference.
comptaConfig.particulierDescBE: Side income (in addition to salaried employment or no other activity). Everything goes through your IPP return via Tax-on-web.
comptaConfig.indepPrincipalBEDesc: Self-employed as main activity (full INASTI/RSVZ contributions at 20.5%). Registered with the BCE.
comptaConfig.indepComplBEDesc: Self-employed alongside main salaried employment. Reduced social contributions.
comptaConfig.srlBEDesc: Limited Liability Company (formerly SPRL, 2019 reform). Corporate tax 25% (or 20% SME 1st bracket), BNB annual accounts, Biztax.
comptaConfig.saBEDesc: Public Limited Company. Min. capital €61,500. Same ISoc/annual accounts obligations as an SRL, more formal structure.
comptaConfig.beDisclaimer: Tipote covers Belgian federal obligations (VAT via Intervat, IPP/ISoc, INASTI, BNB annual accounts, client + intra-EU listings). Regional specifics (Walloon/Flemish/Brussels SME grants, vehicle VAT) are not detailed - your accountant remains the reference.
comptaConfig.particulierDescES: Side income (in addition to salaried employment or no other activity). Everything goes through your annual IRPF declaration (Modelo 100).
comptaConfig.autonomoESDesc: Self-employed worker, registered with RETA. Monthly social contributions via TGSS, quarterly IRPF Modelos 130/131, quarterly VAT Modelo 303.
comptaConfig.sluESDesc: Sociedad Limitada Unipessoal - single shareholder. Corporate tax 25% (or 23% small companies), annual accounts Registro Mercantil, Modelo 200.
comptaConfig.slESDesc: Sociedad Limitada - 2 or more shareholders. Same IS/annual accounts obligations as an SLU.
comptaConfig.saESDesc: Sociedad Anónima. Min. capital €60,000, more formal structure. Same IS obligations as an SL.
comptaConfig.esDisclaimer: Tipote covers Spanish federal obligations (IVA via Modelo 303/390/349, IRPF Modelos 100/130, IS Modelo 200/202, monthly RETA via TGSS, annual accounts Registro Mercantil). Régimen Foral (País Vasco, Navarra): Hacienda Foral replaces AEAT. Canarias: IGIC instead of IVA. Ceuta/Melilla: IPSI. For exact tax calculations and regional specifics (IRPF deductions per CCAA), your asesor fiscal remains the reference.
comptaConfig.particulierDescCA: Side income without structured business activity. Everything goes through your annual T1 (and TP-1 in QC).
comptaConfig.travAutonomeCADesc: Unregistered sole proprietor (in QC: not registered with REQ). Income declared on your personal T1 via T2125. Filing June 15, payment April 30.
comptaConfig.entIndivCADesc: Sole proprietor registered under a trade name (in QC: registered with REQ with NEQ). Same tax obligations as a self-employed worker + annual registry declaration.
comptaConfig.incProvCADesc: Incorporated under provincial law (Quebec Business Corporations Act, OBCA in Ontario, etc.). Federal T2 + provincial return (CO-17 in QC). Activity limited to the province.
comptaConfig.incFedCADesc: Incorporated under the Canada Business Corporations Act (CBCA), via Corporations Canada. Allows operation across Canada under the same name. Federal T2 + provincial returns based on presence.
comptaConfig.caDisclaimer: Tipote covers GST (5% federal, CRA) and its provincial variants: QST 9.975% in QC (Revenu Québec manages GST+QST via FPZ-500), harmonized HST 13% (ON) or 15% (NB/NL/NS/PE), separate PST/RST in BC/SK/MB. AB and territories (YT, NT, NU) only collect GST. T1/TP-1 (individuals, self-employed), T2/CO-17 (corporations), DAS/CPP/QPP/QPIP, instalments. For exact tax calculations and provincial specifics, your accountant remains the reference.
comptaConfig.particulierDescUS: Side income, no structured business activity. Everything goes through your annual 1040.
comptaConfig.solePropDesc: No separate legal entity. Income on Schedule C of personal 1040 + self-employment tax 15.3%. EIN not required (SSN suffices). Quarterly estimated taxes.
comptaConfig.smllcDesc: Single-member LLC. By default "disregarded entity" (= Schedule C, identical to sole prop for tax). Can elect S-Corp via Form 2553 (savings on self-employment tax above ~$50k profit) or C-Corp via Form 8832.
comptaConfig.mmllcDesc: LLC with 2+ members. By default "partnership" (Form 1065 + K-1 distributed to members). Can also elect S-Corp or C-Corp.
comptaConfig.cCorpDesc: Federal Form 1120, flat 21% rate since TCJA 2017. Double taxation: the corp pays tax, then shareholders pay again on dividends. Default choice for VC-backed startups.
comptaConfig.sCorpDesc: Form 1120-S + K-1. Pass-through (no federal tax at corp level). Saves on self-employment tax via "reasonable salary + distributions". Max 100 shareholders, US citizens/residents only.
comptaConfig.usDisclaimer: Tipote covers the federal tax calendar (Forms 1040, 1120, 1120-S, 1065, 1040-ES, 1099-NEC) + state income tax for the 41 states that collect one (9 don't: AK, FL, NV, NH, SD, TN, TX, WA, WY). Sales tax modeled by state of registration (monthly reminder on the 20th). No automatic sales tax rate calculation (45+ states × ~10,000 local jurisdictions) - use Stripe Tax / TaxJar / Avalara for accuracy. Your CPA remains the reference for precise calculations and elections (Form 2553 S-election, Form 8832 entity classification).
comptaConfig.particulierQuestion: What is the nature of your income?
comptaConfig.particulierQuestionHint: This determines which box to fill on your income tax return (form 2042 + 2042-C-PRO).
comptaConfig.bncAccessHint: Consulting, coaching, training, intellectual services… (BNC scheme)
comptaConfig.bicAccessHint: Product sales, craft services, e-commerce… (BIC scheme)
comptaConfig.otherHint: Rental income, royalties, other special cases.
comptaConfig.particulierHelpLabel: Official help impots.gouv.fr - declaring side income
comptaConfig.aeActivityHint: Determines the VAT thresholds and URSSAF rates that apply to you.
comptaConfig.aeStartedHint: Date you registered your micro-business. Used to calculate threshold prorating in year 1.
comptaConfig.aeAcreDesc: ACRE = partial exemption from URSSAF contributions in year 1 (reduced rate). Only if you applied for and were granted it at registration.
comptaConfig.aeVlTitle: Have you opted for versement libératoire?
comptaConfig.aeVlDesc: You pay income tax at the same time as your contributions (1% to 2.2% of revenue depending on activity), instead of the standard annual return.
comptaConfig.aeVatFranchiseTitle: Are you under the VAT franchise?
comptaConfig.aeVatFranchiseDesc: Yes by default for most AEs starting out. If you've exceeded the thresholds or voluntarily opted for VAT, uncheck.
comptaConfig.aeVatRegimeHint: You're no longer under franchise → you file VAT returns. The simplified scheme (annual CA12 + 2 advance payments) is the most common for AEs leaving the franchise.
comptaConfig.aeUrssafLabel: You declare your revenue to URSSAF…
comptaConfig.aeUrssafHint: Chosen at URSSAF registration (changeable once a year). Determines the deadlines shown in your fiscal calendar.
comptaConfig.eurlRegimeHint: By default an EURL is taxed under IR (profit is added to your personal return via 2031/2035). You can opt for IS if you prefer to pay tax at the company level.
comptaConfig.sarlGerantHint: Majority manager (> 50% of shares) = TNS, separate URSSAF contributions, no DSN. Minority or equal = treated as employee, DSN required if paid.
comptaConfig.eurlIRBox: EURL under IR mode: your tax bundle (2031 or 2035 depending on activity) must be transmitted by early May each year. The profit is then reported on your personal 2042. No IS or DSN in this case.
comptaConfig.sirenHintBefore: 9 digits. You can find it on your Kbis extract or on
comptaConfig.fiscalYearHintFR: Most SASUs close on December 31. If your closing date is another month, indicate it below.
comptaConfig.fyCalendarLabel: My fiscal year = calendar year (Jan 1 → Dec 31)
comptaConfig.vatRegimeHint: Find this info on your tax situation notice or on impots.gouv.fr → Pro space → Steps → Consult.
comptaConfig.vatHelpLabel: How do I declare my VAT?
comptaConfig.sasuVatIntraTitle: Do you invoice clients in the European Union (outside France)?
comptaConfig.sasuVatIntraDesc: If yes, you must file a DES (European Services Declaration) each month you've invoiced an EU client. Enable this option for Tipote to remind you.
comptaConfig.sasuDirigeantTitle: Do you pay yourself a salary as director?
comptaConfig.sasuDirigeantDesc: If yes, you contribute to URSSAF (employee-like scheme) and file a DSN. If you pay yourself only via dividends, uncheck.
comptaConfig.sasuDirigeantHelpLabel: Social status of the SASU president
comptaConfig.chImportantBox: Important Switzerland: Tipote calculates your deadlines based on your canton (tax filing deadline + portal). Tax rates (IBO, IRPP) vary across the 26 cantons and their municipalities - your accountant remains the reference for exact calculations.
comptaConfig.chCantonHint: Determines your tax return deadline and the portal you'll be directed to.
comptaConfig.chIdeHintBefore: Format CHE-XXX.XXX.XXX. You can find it on your commercial register extract or on
comptaConfig.chVatAssujettiDesc: Subjection becomes mandatory once your worldwide revenue exceeds CHF 100,000/year. Below, you can remain non-subject (or opt in voluntarily).
comptaConfig.chVatPeriodicityHint: Determines the deadlines for your returns (Q1→May 31, Q2→Aug 31, Q3→Nov 30, Q4→Feb 28 for quarterly).
comptaConfig.chVatMethodHint: Effective = standard deductible VAT (each supplier invoice). TDFN = Net Tax Debt Rate = flat rate based on your branch (simpler, but often less advantageous).
comptaConfig.ptImportantBox: Portugal: Tipote calculates your IVA, IRS/IRC and Segurança Social deadlines from official AT (Autoridade Tributária) dates. Tax rates and municipal derrama vary - your contabilista certificado remains the reference for calculations.
comptaConfig.ptNifHintBefore: 9 digits. You can find it on the portal
comptaConfig.ptRegionHint: Madeira and Açores have reduced IVA rates compared to the continent (22% and 16% instead of 23% for the standard rate).
comptaConfig.ptTaxRegimeHint: Simplificado regime: flat-rate on 75% of revenue, light accounting. Contabilidade organizada: full accounting, mandatory above €200,000 revenue.
comptaConfig.ptIvaIsentoDesc: If you're under the €15,000 annual revenue threshold (art. 53 CIVA), you're exempt and don't charge VAT. Above, you collect IVA and file monthly/quarterly.
comptaConfig.ptIvaIsentoHelpLabel: More info on the isenção regime
comptaConfig.ptIvaPeriodicityHint: Quarterly if revenue < €650,000 (most common). Monthly above. Deadline: day 25 of the 2nd month following the period.
comptaConfig.beImportantBox: Belgium: Tipote calculates your VAT (Intervat), IPP/ISoc, INASTI/RSVZ deadlines, BNB annual accounts and client/intra-EU listings. For exact tax calculations (ISoc + derrama rates, regional grants, vehicle VAT), your accountant remains the reference.
comptaConfig.beBceHintBefore: 10 digits. You can find it on
comptaConfig.beRegionHint: Affects some regional grants/aid. The fiscal calendar itself remains federal.
comptaConfig.beVatFranchiseDesc: If your annual revenue is below €25,000 (art. 56bis CTVA), you can opt for the franchise. You don't charge VAT and have no VAT returns to file.
comptaConfig.beVatFranchiseHelpLabel: More info on the VAT franchise
comptaConfig.beVatPeriodicityHint: Quarterly if revenue < €2.5M (most common). Monthly above. Deadline: 20th of the month following the period, on Intervat.
comptaConfig.beIntraEuTitle: Do you make sales to the EU?
comptaConfig.beIntraEuDesc: If yes, you must file an intra-community listing (state 723) each quarter, in addition to your VAT returns. Mandatory from €1 invoiced to a VAT-registered EU client.
comptaConfig.beInastiBox: INASTI/RSVZ contributions: quarterly advance payments (March 20, June 20, September 20, December 20), payable to your social insurance fund (Acerta, Group S, Partena, Liantis, Xerius…).
comptaConfig.esImportantBox: Spain: Tipote calculates your IVA (Modelo 303/390/349), IRPF (Modelos 100/130), IS (Modelo 200/202), monthly RETA and annual Registro Mercantil deadlines. For exact tax calculations and IRPF deductions specific to your Comunidad Autónoma, your asesor fiscal remains the reference.
comptaConfig.esCommunityHint: Determines whether you fall under AEAT (common regime) or a Hacienda Foral (País Vasco, Navarra). Also affects IVA → IGIC (Canarias) or IPSI (Ceuta/Melilla).
comptaConfig.esForalNote: Régimen Foral detected → you file via Hacienda Foral (euskadi.eus for País Vasco, navarra.es for Navarra), not AEAT. Same calendar but foral modelos.
comptaConfig.esCanariasNote: Canarias → IGIC instead of IVA. General rate 7%. Modelo 420 (quarterly) / 425 (annual) instead of 303/390. No intra-EU operations.
comptaConfig.esIpsiNote: Ceuta/Melilla → IPSI (Tax on Production, Services and Imports) instead of IVA. Out of Tipote MVP scope - the accounting module will show your IRPF / IS / RETA deadlines but not IPSI. Check with your ciudad autónoma.
comptaConfig.esCifHintBefore: For a company: 1 letter + 8 digits (B = SL, A = SA). For an autónomo: DNI (8 digits + 1 letter) or NIE. You can find it on
comptaConfig.esIvaRegimeHint: General = default. Simplificado = flat-rate for certain activities (simplified modelo 303). Recargo de equivalencia = retail (IVA passed through by supplier). Exención = exempt activities (health, education, etc.).
comptaConfig.esIvaPeriodicityHint: Quarterly by default (Q1 → Apr 20, Q2 → Jul 20, Q3 → Oct 20, Q4 → Jan 30). Monthly mandatory if revenue > €6M or if registered with REDEME (monthly refund registry).
comptaConfig.esRedemeDesc: The Registro de Devolución Mensual allows you to recover VAT each month (instead of waiting for the annual balance). Voluntary registration via Modelo 036/039. Involves monthly returns.
comptaConfig.esIrpfMethodHint: Estimación directa = full accounting (quarterly Modelo 130). Módulos = flat-rate by sector (quarterly Modelo 131) - limited to certain activities listed by AEAT.
comptaConfig.esRetaBox: RETA (Special Self-Employed Workers Scheme): monthly contributions via TGSS, based on your real income (2023 reform). Bank direct debit on the last working day of the month.
comptaConfig.caRegimeQc: Revenu Québec manages GST and QST together via form FPZ-500.
comptaConfig.caRegimeTvhBefore: Harmonized HST managed by the CRA (
comptaConfig.caRegimeNone: No provincial tax, only federal GST (5%).
comptaConfig.caBnHint: The CRA BN is 9 digits (RT/RC/RP accounts are added as suffix). The Quebec NEQ is 10 digits. Optional if you're not registered.
comptaConfig.caPetitFournisseurDesc: If your worldwide revenue is below $30,000 over 4 consecutive quarters, you're not required to register for GST. You can still register voluntarily to recover ITCs/RITC on your purchases.
comptaConfig.caGstRegisteredDescQQ: Registered for GST and QST (Revenu Québec handles both). Mandatory if revenue > $30,000, optional otherwise.
comptaConfig.caGstRegisteredDescGen: Registered for GST (and the applicable provincial tax). Mandatory if revenue > $30,000, optional otherwise (with ITC/RITC recovery as a bonus).
comptaConfig.caGstPeriodFootnote: The frequency is assigned by the CRA based on your volume - the option here matches what you've been notified. You can request a change (to more frequent always possible, to less frequent if revenue decreasing).
comptaConfig.caReqBox: REQ reminder: as an individual enterprise registered with the Quebec Enterprise Registrar, you must file an annual update declaration (on the anniversary of registration).
comptaConfig.caT2Footnote: Federal T2 is due 6 months after fiscal year-end. The balance is due at 2 months (3 months for SPCC eligible for the small business deduction).
comptaConfig.caFedFootnote: Federal corporation (CBCA): registered office typically declared in a province of operation. If the office is in QC, REQ registration is required in addition to Corporations Canada.
comptaConfig.caQcFootnote: Quebec provincial corporation (LSAQ): REQ registration required.
comptaConfig.caProvFootnote: Provincial corporation: registration with the provincial enterprise registry (depending on the chosen province).
comptaConfig.usImportantBox: United States: Tipote calculates your federal deadlines (Forms 1040 / 1120 / 1120-S / 1065 / 1040-ES / 1099-NEC), your state income tax (except 9 states without), and a monthly reminder per state where you collect sales tax. For exact tax calculations, tax elections (S-election, entity classification) and sales tax rate calculations (~10,000 local jurisdictions), your CPA and a dedicated tool (Stripe Tax / TaxJar / Avalara) remain the reference.
comptaConfig.usStateNoIncomeTax: does not collect state income tax on business income - you only have federal to file. Typical savings: 4 to 9% of net income.
comptaConfig.usStateHasIncomeTax: collects state income tax - you file a return parallel to federal, generally on the same date (April 15).
comptaConfig.usNoSalesTaxNote: No state-level sales tax (NH, OR, MT, DE).
comptaConfig.usEinOptional: Optional - a sole prop / single-member LLC without employees can use its SSN.
comptaConfig.usEinRequired: Required for multi-member LLC, C-Corp, S-Corp and any entity with employees.
comptaConfig.usLlcDefaultSingle: By default: disregarded entity (= Schedule C, identical to sole prop for tax).
comptaConfig.usLlcElectS: You can elect S-Corp (Form 2553) or C-Corp (Form 8832).
comptaConfig.usSalesTaxStatesLabel: States where you collect sales tax
comptaConfig.usSalesTaxStatesHint: Check each state where you're registered to collect and remit sales tax (economic nexus if you exceed revenue or transaction thresholds). Tipote issues a monthly reminder per state (the 20th of the following month). If you use Stripe Tax / TaxJar, still indicate the states here to get your filing reminders.
comptaConfig.usStatesNone: No state selected - no sales tax to collect.
comptaConfig.usMultiLlcBox: Multi-member LLC: by default, your LLC files a Form 1065 (partnership return) and issues K-1s to each member. Deadline: March 15 (calendar year), automatic 6-month extension (Sep 15). If you made an S/C election, the calendar changes.
comptaConfig.usSCorpBox: S-Corp: Form 1120-S due March 15 (calendar year). Pass-through, no federal tax at entity level. Reasonable salary required for owner-employees (otherwise risk of IRS reclassification).
comptaConfig.usCCorpFootnote: C-Corp 1120 due on the 15th of the 4th month after fiscal year-end (April 15 in calendar year). Auto 6-month extension via Form 7004.
comptaConfig.usSCorpFootnote: S-Corp 1120-S due on the 15th of the 3rd month after fiscal year-end (March 15 in calendar year). Must in principle remain on calendar year unless 444 election.

comptaManual.introHint: Stripe / PayPal / Mollie: bank transfers, cash, checks. Enter them here so they count toward your revenue.
comptaManual.emptyState: You don't have any manual entries yet. If you receive payments by transfer, cash or check, add them here so they count toward your revenue.
comptaManual.refundHint: For a refund, enter a negative amount (e.g. -50).
comptaManual.categorySaleHint: You sold a product or service
comptaManual.categoryAffiliateHint: You earn a commission on someone else's sale
comptaManual.title: Manual entries
comptaManual.natureHint: To separate your direct sales from your affiliate commissions in the dashboard.

contentDetail.errorTitle: An error occurred. Try again or return to the list.
contentDetail.notFoundDesc: This content doesn't exist (or you don't have access).

settingsTabs.metaCapiTokenHint: Enables server-side conversion sending (resistant to ad blockers, improves matching, deduplicated with the pixel). Events Manager → your dataset → Settings → Conversions API → "Generate access token". To be used with the pixel above.
settingsTabs.storytellingDesc: Tell your journey in 6 steps. Tipote will use your story to personalize your content, sales pages, emails and posts.
settingsTabs.story1Desc: Once upon a time… Describe your life / business before the trigger. The "normal" world you used to live in.
settingsTabs.story2Desc: But one day… What event changed everything? The moment when the established order was disrupted.
settingsTabs.story3Desc: The struggles, doubts, failures. The situation deteriorates before improving.
settingsTabs.story4Desc: The worst moment. Everything seems lost for the hero. But a solution emerges.
settingsTabs.story5Desc: The resolution. Your situation gradually improves thanks to what you discovered.
settingsTabs.story6Desc: The positive final picture. Your life today, better than before. And why you help others now.
settingsTabs.noPersonaSummaryHint: Click "Enrich with AI" to generate a summary of your ideal client.
settingsTabs.personaSummaryStaleTitle: The persona summary has been modified since the last enrichment
settingsTabs.personaSummaryStaleHintDetailed: Click "Enrich with AI" to update the detailed persona with your changes.
settingsTabs.noDetailedPersonaHint: Click "Enrich with AI" to generate an ultra-detailed persona profile of your ideal client.
settingsTabs.personaSummaryStaleHintSynthesis: Click "Enrich with AI" to update the synthesis.
settingsTabs.noNarrativeSynthesisHint: Click "Enrich with AI" to generate a complete synthesis.
settingsTabs.linkSioProductHint: Choose your product from the list - Tipote will attribute each sale to the correct offer in your analytics. If you don't link it, we try to match automatically by name or price.
settingsTabs.tipoteAffiliateDesc: On every published popquiz, a discreet "This video is brought to you via Tiquiz" redirects to the Tiquiz presentation page. Paste your Systeme.io affiliate ID below and every signup that follows earns you a commission - automatically.
settingsTabs.tipoteAffiliateWhereToFind: Where do I find my ID? Log in to Systeme.io → Affiliate dashboard → in the top right you'll see your affiliate ID (starts with sa). Copy it, paste it here, that's it.
settingsTabs.tipoteAffiliateNotRegistered: Not registered to the program yet?
settingsTabs.tipoteAffiliateEmptyHint: If you leave this field empty, the footer stays visible but without tracking - signups won't earn you anything.

insights.errGeneric: The analysis failed. Try again in a moment.
insights.comingSoon: Coming soon on a higher plan.
insights.globalLock: The AI reads the stats of ALL your quizzes and surveys and tells you what to keep, what to fix and what to launch next to capture and sell more. Your strategy, at a glance. Free updates.
insights.globalUpsell: Available in the Tiquiz monthly+ (29€/mo) or yearly+ (290€/yr) plans. Order pages are being prepared, we'll let you know.
insights.globalNotEnough: Not enough overall activity yet. Come back when you have at least {minLeads} leads across all your projects.
insights.globalIntro: Steering your acquisition: what works to amplify, what blocks to fix, and your next moves. Based on the real numbers of all your projects.
insights.quizLock: The AI analysis reads your visits, completion and capture rate, infers your visitors' profile, spots the drop-off point and gives you concrete actions to capture and sell more. Free updates.
insights.quizUpsell: Available (for your quizzes AND surveys) in the Tiquiz monthly+ (29€/mo) or yearly+ (290€/yr) plans, which also include multi-profiles. Order pages are being prepared, we'll let you know.
insights.quizNotEnough: Not enough activity yet for a reliable analysis. Come back when you have at least {minLeads} leads or {minViews} views: the AI needs real numbers to give you accurate conclusions.
insights.quizIntro: Your full diagnosis: what works, where you lose people, who your visitors are, and what to do to capture and sell more. Free updates.
insights.quizSectionActions: Actions to capture and sell more
insights.surveyExportBody: Your choice: CSV or Excel (one row per respondent, ready columns: identity + answers), or PDF (aggregated report + respondent details, ready to present).
insights.surveyLock: The AI analysis decodes what your answers really say, sums up the key takeaways and suggests concrete actions to put in place. Free updates.
insights.surveyNotEnough: There aren't enough responses for a meaningful analysis ({total}/{min}). Come back when you have at least {min} responses.
insights.surveyIntro: What your results really say, the key takeaways, and the actions to put in place. Free updates.
insights.surveyErrNotEnough: Not enough responses for a meaningful analysis.
insights.costFirstCredit: The first analysis costs 1 AI credit, updates are free.
